name: ANAR / Romanian Waters GIS Portal
dataType: River water bodies, lakes, coastal and transitional waters, river basin boundaries
description: ArcGIS-based GIS portal of the National Water Administration showing water bodies, river basins, and hydrological infrastructure across Romania's 11 river basin districts.

name: APIA LPIS Agricultural Parcel Identification System
operator: Agentia de Plati si Interventie pentru Agricultura (APIA)
dataType: Agricultural reference parcels, physical blocks, land use, eligible agricultural area
description: Land Parcel Identification System for Romania based on orthophotos with sub-metric precision, used as the reference database for EU Common Agricultural Policy area-based payments.

name: INFP Earthquake Data Portal
operator: Institutul National de Cercetare-Dezvoltare pentru Fizica Pamantului (INCDFP/INFP)
dataType: Earthquake catalogues (ROMPLUS 984-present), seismic waveforms, focal mechanisms, seismic hazard maps
description: Data portal of Romania's National Institute for Earth Physics providing the ROMPLUS earthquake catalogue, real-time seismicity, waveform data via EIDA, and seismic hazard products.

name: ANPM Atlas Explorer
dataType: Environmental monitoring stations, pollution sources, waste management, Seveso sites
description: Interactive atlas of the National Environmental Protection Agency showing environmental monitoring data, pollution sources, and regulatory information across Romania.

name: Ministry of Environment GIS Portal - Protected Areas and Natura 2000
dataType: Natura 2000 sites (SPA, SCI), biogeographic regions, species and habitat distribution, national park management plans
description: Interactive GIS portal of Romania's Ministry of Environment providing maps of Natura 2000 sites, protected natural areas, biogeographic regions, and species distribution covering 23% of national territory.

name: INHGA National Hydrological Monitoring
operator: Institutul National de Hidrologie si Gospodarire a Apelor (INHGA)
dataType: River water levels, discharge, precipitation, hydrological forecasts, flood warnings
description: Real-time hydrological monitoring from 625 automatic stations across Romania, providing water level, discharge, and precipitation data with DESWAT flood forecasting capabilities.

name: geo-spatial.org Open Geodata and eHarta
dataType: Open geodata layers, historical georeferenced maps (eHarta), administrative boundaries, topographic data
description: Community-driven open geospatial data portal and Romania's OSGeo local chapter, hosting curated datasets and the award-winning eHarta collection of thousands of georeferenced historical maps.

name: Romania National Forest Inventory (IFN)
dataType: Forest stand data, tree species composition, volume, biomass, growing stock, forest health indicators
description: Continuous national forest inventory on a systematic grid covering all forest vegetation in Romania, implemented by INCDS with 5-year measurement cycles and published results at national and regional level.

name: ICPA Soil Map and SIGSTAR Database
operator: Institutul National de Cercetare-Dezvoltare pentru Pedologie, Agrochimie si Protectia Mediului (ICPA)
dataType: Soil mapping units, topsoil texture, soil type classification, land suitability for crops, erosion risk
description: National soil database SIGSTAR-200 containing tens of thousands of polygons with soil mapping units, texture classes, and land evaluation data developed by ICPA Bucharest since the 1980s.

name: data.gov.ro - Romania Open Data Portal
dataType: Government open datasets across economy, environment, health, governance, transport, agriculture
description: Romania's central government open data portal hosting over 3000 datasets from 116 public institutions in DCAT-AP compliant format, including geospatial and environmental datasets.

name: NIGGG-BAS Earthquake Monitoring Portal
operator: National Institute of Geophysics, Geodesy and Geography (NIGGG-BAS)
dataType: Earthquake catalogues, real-time seismicity, seismic station data, seismograms
description: Real-time earthquake monitoring portal of Bulgaria's NOTSSI network with 33 digital seismic stations, providing the homogeneous Bulgarian earthquake catalogue and live seismicity data.

name: Natura 2000 Bulgaria Portal
dataType: Natura 2000 site boundaries, species lists, habitat types, management plans, administrative affiliations
description: Official Natura 2000 information system for Bulgaria covering 339 sites (34.4% of national territory), with interactive map viewer and site-level data on habitats and species.

name: Executive Forest Agency (IAG) Information System
dataType: National forest fund data, forest inventory, fire statistics, timber harvest records, forest management plans
description: Information system of Bulgaria's Executive Forest Agency managing the national forest fund database, forest inventory data, fire monitoring, and annual forest resource reports.

name: BNRA Gamma Background Radiation Monitoring
dataType: Gamma background radiation levels, dose rates, environmental radioactivity monitoring
description: Daily gamma background radiation monitoring bulletin from BNRA's BULRaMo network integrated with Kozloduy NPP's AISERC system, reporting dose rates across Bulgaria.

name: IO-BAS Black Sea Oceanographic Data Centre
operator: Institute of Oceanology, Bulgarian Academy of Sciences (IO-BAS)
dataType: CTD profiles, sea surface temperature, salinity, chlorophyll, coastal dynamics, bathymetry
description: Bulgaria's National Oceanographic Data Centre at the Institute of Oceanology in Varna, archiving and distributing marine data from the western Black Sea including CTD, water quality, and coastal monitoring.

name: NSI Population Grid and Census Geodata
dataType: 1 km population grid, demographic indicators by LAU, census statistics with spatial reference
description: Georeferenced population grid datasets at 1 km resolution from the Bulgarian census (2011, 2021), projected in ETRS89 Lambert conformal conic, distributed as geodatabase files.

name: BSDI - Bulgarian Spatial Data Infrastructure Portal
operator: ASDE - Agency for Sustainable Development and Eurointegration
dataType: Land cover / land use classification (UN-FAO LCCS2), historical maps, satellite-derived spatial data
description: Open spatial databases and operational services portal providing land cover data processed with UN-FAO LCCS2 standard, historical maps, and Copernicus-derived products for Bulgaria and the Lower Danube / Black Sea region.

name: ISSAPP Pushkarov Soil Database
operator: Institute of Soil Science, Agrotechnologies and Plant Protection Nikola Pushkarov
dataType: Soil maps (1:10000 to 1:400000), soil classification, salinization, heavy metal contamination, land evaluation
description: National soil database maintained by the Pushkarov Institute with digitized soil maps covering nearly all of Bulgaria at 1:10000 scale, plus specialized maps for salinization, pollution, and land suitability.

name: East Aegean River Basin Directorate Water Portal
dataType: Water body status, water quality monitoring, river basin management plans, water permits, GIS databases
description: Water management portal for the East Aegean basin district (Maritsa, Tundzha, Arda rivers) providing water quality data, river basin management plans, and GIS-based water body assessments under the EU Water Framework Directive.

name: KAIS Cadastral Map Portal
operator: Agency of Geodesy, Cartography and Cadastre (AGKK)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property boundaries, orthophotos (2011/2019/2022), topographic maps, Geocard Fund
description: Interactive cadastral map portal of AGKK providing public access to cadastral parcels, multi-year orthophotos, and topographic base maps for all of Bulgaria.
